mission: Use Google AI Studio and Gemini as a governed frontend, workflow, and revenue-experiment planning lane for Buddy and every bot.

secret_policy.secret_storage: GitHub Actions secret, Google Secret Manager, or local environment only

frontend_perfection_loop.label: Prompt to Screen Map
frontend_perfection_loop.purpose: Turn a bot business idea into screens, states, navigation, data contracts, and proof requirements.

frontend_perfection_loop.label: Screen to Code Packet
frontend_perfection_loop.purpose: Prepare implementation-ready React, CSS, test, accessibility, and responsive layout packets.

frontend_perfection_loop.label: Visual QA Loop
frontend_perfection_loop.purpose: Compare generated screens against professional UI rules and rerun until layout, copy, spacing, and states are clean.

frontend_perfection_loop.label: Test and Eval Loop
frontend_perfection_loop.purpose: Require build, unit tests, smoke tests, accessibility checks, and sandbox user flows after every generated change.

daily_money_experiment_policy.target: Every bot prepares a daily money experiment, not an unverified money claim.
daily_money_experiment_policy.actual_revenue_rule: Actual daily money can only be recorded after payment confirmation.

model_routing.verification_rule: Verify the current Google model ID and pricing before production use.

dashboard_prompts: Use Google AI Studio to draft the cleanest frontend plan for this bot, with tests and approval gates.
Generate two workflow variants for this bot and pick the safer money experiment.
Find the highest-value customer problem this bot can solve today and prepare a sandbox demo packet.
Review this bot UI like a professional product designer and produce a fix queue.
